message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.drop_duplicates (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.drop_duplicates()
across the keep semantics:

- drop_duplicates_keep_first: keep=First (default), rows 2 and 4 are
  duplicates of rows 0 and 1 — they get dropped, rows 0/1/3 survive
- drop_duplicates_keep_none: keep=None, every duplicated row gets
  dropped — only the truly-unique row 3 survives

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.drop_duplicates(keep=...)), runs the Rust DataFrame.drop_
duplicates(None, DuplicateKeep::*, false), and asserts parity via
compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameDropDuplicates was already
wired through the Frame response branch; this fills the live-oracle
test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-d68ft]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
